description: Initial security/hardening pass: Zod env validation, helmet CSP, rate limiting, body limits, error-handler hardening, JWT stub removal, docker-compose MySQL, schema.sql, README rewrite, LICENSE, CHANGELOG.

Quick-wins batch: version bump to 0.1.0, .nvmrc pinning Node 20.12.0, fix frontend lint warnings (non-null assertion in main.tsx, any in .storybook/main.ts), ESLint argsIgnorePattern for underscore-prefixed params, CHANGELOG link in README, mandatory CHANGELOG-update rule added to CLAUDE.md and all three agent definitions.

Fork-readiness pass: shared API contract in libs/types (Zod as source of truth: UserSchema, ListUsersQuerySchema, ApiSuccess/Error helpers), first real libs/utils (formatError, isDefined), backend GET /api/users route with typed service + validate middleware, AppError class hierarchy, pino + pino-http structured logging with redaction, graceful SIGTERM/SIGINT shutdown, frontend users feature with queryKey factory hook and Storybook-covered UsersList, TS path aliases @mcb/types and @mcb/utils, backend e2e coverage, .editorconfig + CONTRIBUTING.md + SECURITY.md, backend watch-mode serve, ESLint @nx/dependency-checks workaround for vitest-via-tsconfig, dropped type:module from libs to fix Node16 backend resolution.
Added npm run check script running format:check, lint, typecheck, and test sequentially.
Added npm run build script (runs check then builds all projects) and updated README + CONTRIBUTING to reference npm run check.
Docs sweep: updated README production build snippet and CLAUDE.md commands list to reference npm run check / npm run build.

Added GitHub Actions CI (check/build/e2e/attribution-guard), Dependabot config, husky+lint-staged pre-commit, check:affected script, frontend Zod env validation, and end-to-end x-request-id correlation between backend pino-http and frontend axios.

Ripped out .github/ (Actions workflow + Dependabot) and replaced with GitLab-native .gitlab-ci.yml covering check/build/storybook-build/e2e/lighthouse/commitlint/npm-audit/attribution-guard plus SAST/Secret-Detection/Dependency-Scanning templates. Added renovate.json, lighthouserc.json, commitlint.config.js, .husky/commit-msg, README CI section, and @commitlint devDeps.
Merged duplicated ### Added header and removed stray - CI ? placeholder line under [Unreleased] in CHANGELOG.md.
Restored commitlint, npm-audit, attribution-guard, storybook-build jobs in .gitlab-ci.yml and fixed broken e2e playwright image.
Bumped @tanstack/react-router and @tanstack/router-plugin to latest to fix CI build failure on routeTree.gen.ts double-generation; added --no-distribution to all nx-cloud start-ci-run calls.
Commitlint CI job now lints only the MR title, not every commit in range, so historical non-conforming commits do not block MRs.
Removed duplicate nx-cloud start-ci-run calls from build and e2e jobs; only check calls it now, so Nx Cloud groups all jobs into one pipeline execution.

Ported .gitlab-ci.yml to .github/workflows/ci.yml with equivalent check/commitlint/npm-audit/attribution-guard/build/storybook-build/e2e/lighthouse jobs; added CodeQL workflow as GitLab SAST replacement; updated README, SECURITY, package.json author URL.
Migrated renovate.json from deprecated matchPackagePatterns to matchPackageNames with /regex/ syntax.
Bumped .nvmrc to 20.19.2 and engines.node to >=20.19.0 to satisfy @swc/cli@0.8.1 requirement; previous 20.12.0 pin caused EBADENGINE in CI.

Switched vite.config.mts from tanstackRouter to tanstackRouterGenerator so only the route-tree generator runs (not the code splitter as well), fixing the File already exists. Cannot overwrite. build failure.

Hardened .github/workflows/ci.yml: workflow-level least-privilege permissions, timeout-minutes on all jobs, nx fix-ci on build+e2e failures, lightweight commitlint without npm ci, npm-audit moved to weekly schedule, upload-artifact if-no-files-found=error, and new reusable composite action at .github/actions/setup-node-deps/action.yml adopted across jobs.
Build job failed on CI-only commits because nx affected was a no-op and dist/ did not exist; changed upload-artifact if-no-files-found from error to ignore.
Add safe.directory step after checkout in e2e job so git CLI works inside the Playwright container and nx affected can resolve the base SHA.
Tolerate missing dist artifact in lighthouse job and skip lhci cleanly when affected build was a no-op.
Split scheduled jobs into ci-scheduled.yml and make npm-audit actionable by filing or updating a tracking issue on high/critical findings.

Add paths-ignore + frontend detect job + main-only lighthouse + drop diagnostic + pin all action SHAs in ci.yml/codeql.yml; add license-scan/outdated-deps/bundle-size/stale-branches jobs to ci-scheduled.yml; configure Renovate to pin and group github-actions updates.
Replace the leave-commit-null rule in CLAUDE.md with a mandatory two-commit flow so the commit field always points to a real SHA.

Fix push base SHA via github.event.before, skip build/e2e/storybook on draft PRs, move lighthouse from per-push to weekly cron (shared with bundle-size build), serialize npm-audit/license-scan/outdated-deps into one dep-health job, opt in to FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24 across all workflows.
Bump Playwright CI image to v1.59.1-jammy and fix backend-e2e global-setup TS errors.
Add mysql:8.4 service container, DB_*/FRONTEND_URL env, and schema.sql load step to the e2e job so the backend can boot under Zod env validation.
Bind backend to 0.0.0.0 in e2e job to fix IPv6-only ECONNREFUSED, and set VITE_API_URL on e2e + bundle-size jobs so frontend build does not throw and lighthouse stops failing with NO_FCP.
Add VITE_API_URL to nx build cache inputs (so the cached bundle busts when the env changes), --cap-add=SYS_ADMIN for firefox sandbox in the e2e container, and lsof for backend-e2e teardown.
Add .ai-attribution.jsonl to paths-ignore in ci.yml + codeql.yml push triggers and document [skip ci] marker on attribution commits in CLAUDE.md.
Keep backend:serve alive for frontend-e2e, set HOME=/root for firefox, relax five noisy lighthouse audits, and remove continue-on-error from the lighthouse step.
Drop [skip ci] from attribution commit template — it was killing CI for the work commit beneath it in bundled two-commit pushes.
Add e2e, e2e:fe, e2e:be npm scripts so contributors can run Playwright/Jest e2e suites locally without raw nx invocations.
Replace placeholder DB creds in .env/.env.example with real local defaults (steamdeck_dev/steamdeck + random password in .env, change-me placeholder in example).

Add scripts/dev-setup-native.sh and auto-detect docker-vs-native in scripts/dev-setup.sh so npm run setup works on hosts without Docker (provisions DB + user via sudo mysql auth_socket, loads db/schema.sql).
Document the native MySQL bootstrap path in README (rewritten Manual Setup section + file tree) and CLAUDE.md (Commands line), covering auth_socket requirement and password constraints.
Document the new e2e npm scripts in README — add e2e/e2e:fe/e2e:be rows to the Daily Development command table and replace the raw nx invocations in the Testing section with the new scripts.

Documentation pass: fix stale docker-only assumptions in README Quick Start + Database sections (native path + reset flow), fix README Security section contradicting SECURITY.md, rewrite README CI/CD section to match ci.yml + ci-scheduled.yml + codeql.yml reality (lighthouse and npm-audit had moved to the weekly pipeline), update CONTRIBUTING.md setup comment.

Free-tier CI efficiency + ergonomics pass. Skip storybook-build and e2e on push-to-main/develop (already ran on the PR), drop CodeQL push trigger and add concurrency group, rewrite commitlint job to reuse setup-node-deps composite and installed binary (saves re-download per PR), add ci-pass aggregator job so branch protection can target one check, add workflow_dispatch to codeql.yml. Plus test:types/test:utils npm scripts and updated lib READMEs + main README command table + CI/CD section.

Add actions/cache@v4 step for .nx/cache in the setup-node-deps composite so forks without NX_CLOUD_ACCESS_TOKEN still get warm-cache speedups on nx affected runs. Two-tier cache story (filesystem L1 + cloud L2) documented in README.
Correct README: attribution-guard only hard-fails on missing CHANGELOG.md; missing .ai-attribution.jsonl append is a soft warning. The CI job itself was already correct.

Rewrite README Daily Development command table as the canonical full list of package.json scripts — add missing setup + prepare entries, group by purpose (Bootstrap / Quality / Unit tests / E2E / Build / Lifecycle / Raw Nx).

Fix frontend-e2e failing in CI because backend-e2e teardown killPort(3000) left the backend dead before Playwright tests ran — frontend-e2e playwright.config.ts now starts backend:serve:development as a second webServer with reuseExistingServer.

Drop killPort(3000) from backend-e2e global-teardown — Nx owns the backend:serve process and killing its port caused coalesce/cancel on frontend-e2e's second backend:serve invocation in the same run-many.
Set Nx defaultBase to develop and update --base=main examples to --base=develop in advance of making develop the default integration branch on GitHub and Nx Cloud.
Removed deprecated baseUrl from tsconfig.base.json and prefixed paths entries with ./ to silence TS 7.0 deprecation warning.
Gate every pull_request-triggered job in .github/workflows/ci.yml on draft==false so draft PRs no longer burn CI minutes; full gate runs on ready_for_review and subsequent synchronize.
Add .github/workflows/force-draft.yml to auto-convert newly opened PRs to draft via gh pr ready --undo on pull_request_target:opened; skips already-draft PRs and bot authors.
Switch force-draft.yml to use FORCE_DRAFT_PAT secret instead of GITHUB_TOKEN because convertPullRequestToDraft GraphQL mutation rejects integration tokens.
Remove paths-ignore from ci.yml pull_request trigger so PRs touching only ignored files still run CI and post the required ci-pass status. Push trigger to main/develop keeps paths-ignore.
Add converted_to_draft to pull_request trigger types so flipping a PR back to draft cancels in-flight CI via concurrency.
Conditionally blank NX_CLOUD_ACCESS_TOKEN in ci.yml based on new NX_CLOUD_ENABLED repo variable so CI keeps running locally when Nx Cloud credits are exhausted.
Add NX_NO_CLOUD env and skip nx-cloud start-ci-run when NX_CLOUD_ENABLED is off, because blanking the token did not stop nx from auth-ing via nxCloudId in nx.json.
Switch apps/frontend/vite.config.mts from tanstackRouterGenerator to TanStackRouterVite so re-runs overwrite routeTree.gen.ts; fixes CI failure when test target runs before build.
Add top-of-README SteamOS/Distrobox context block and a new Nx Cloud configuration subsection documenting NX_CLOUD_ACCESS_TOKEN secret and NX_CLOUD_ENABLED kill switch variable.
Bundle backup.sh and boot_sequence.sh (plus READMEs and local CHANGELOG) into scripts/steamdeck/ and document them in the top-of-README SteamOS block.
Harden CI pipeline (detect-gated jobs, merged check+build, composite action for base resolution, pinned actions) and Nx config (namedInputs, module boundary tags, removed deprecated --all flag).
Add TanStack Router error/not-found components, Storybook addon-a11y, lightweight DB migration system (db/migrations + scripts/migrate.ts), and update all project documentation.

Bump Express 4→5 (read-only req.query fix, async error forwarding, listen error callback), esbuild 0.28, move pino-pretty to devDeps, guard dotenv, Renovate patch automerge + @types/node pin, vitest plugin exclusion.

Bump Node 20 (EOL) → 24 LTS, major-bump commitlint 20, lint-staged 16, eslint-plugin-react-hooks 7, eslint-plugin-playwright 2, jsonc-eslint-parser 3, plus minor/patch bumps across eslint plugins, testing-library, jiti, prettier, ts-node. Add storybook-static + routeTree.gen.ts to ESLint ignores. Pin @types/node to <25 in Renovate.
Add .gitattributes (LF enforcement, binary markers, linguist-generated), .dockerignore, fix .prettierignore storybook-static gap, update README for Node 24 / Express 5.

SHA-pin composite action, fix stale .storybook path filter, suppress MySQL CLI password warning, add FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24 to force-draft.yml, add Renovate customManagers for Playwright image and npx-pinned packages.
Add PR and issue templates, npm run clean script, replace open TODO with scoped deferral in ci.yml e2e job.
Add GitHub Pages workflow deploying frontend app (with --base subpath) and Storybook on push to main.
Fix stale branch targets (main→develop) in CONTRIBUTING.md and correct backend-e2e test runner references (Playwright→Jest) across CLAUDE.md, README.md, and agent definitions.
Fix a11y role on error component, add DB pool error handler, correct backend-e2e tsconfig include.
Add Nx Cloud kill switch to pages.yml so deploys don't fail when free-plan credits are exhausted.
Corrected truncated SHA for actions/deploy-pages@v4 in pages.yml that caused deploy job to fail.
Set TanStack Router basepath to import.meta.env.BASE_URL so the app resolves routes on GitHub Pages subpath; added live demo links to README.
Moved users list to /users route, made index a static welcome page for GitHub Pages demo; fixed not-found Go home link to use Router Link.
Bumped version to 0.2.0, promoted CHANGELOG Unreleased section, and added docs/RELEASE.md documenting the release workflow.
Fixed docs/RELEASE.md post-release sync step to use force-update instead of a merge commit, and linked docs/RELEASE.md from CONTRIBUTING.md and CLAUDE.md.
Removed Convert PR to Draft from required status checks on develop and main rulesets and documented the rationale in docs/RELEASE.md.

Added docs/SEMVER.md defining the public contract for v1.0.0, linked it from CONTRIBUTING.md and CLAUDE.md, added the FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24 comment to pages.yml, and documented the solo-owner CODEOWNERS stance.
Dropped commit field from attribution schema and enhanced attribution-guard CI to enforce JSONL entries for any AI-assistant Co-Authored-By trailer.

Documentation and pipeline audit follow-up: fixed stale commit-field reference in docs/SEMVER.md and speculative v0.3.0 reference in CLAUDE.md; updated README attribution-guard/detect descriptions and VITE_API_URL placeholder note; added SEMVER pointer to README Contributing; removed pre-1.0 language from SECURITY.md; added CHANGELOG and attribution checkboxes to PR template; documented @types/node pin rationale in renovate.json; replaced content-duplicate .agents/skills directory with symlink to .github/skills; ignored .todo.txt scratch file in .gitignore and .prettierignore.

Added selectable PR templates for the three release-flow PR types: bump.md (chore/bump-vX.Y.Z to develop), release.md (develop to main), and hotfix.md (hotfix/slug to main with back-merge note). Updated docs/RELEASE.md steps 6, 7, and the Hotfix flow section to invoke the templates via gh pr create --template instead of inlining heredoc bodies.

Section 1 of the pipeline-improvements audit: rewrote docs/RELEASE.md hotfix flow step 5 with an explicit cherry-pick recipe (the old back-merge instruction conflicted with develop's linear_history ruleset) and added hotfix-sync.md PR template; fixed license-scan silent fail-open in ci-scheduled.yml by removing the exit-code gate and splitting scanner errors onto a separate license-scan-error tracking issue; removed the dead environment: main attribute from the ci-pass job (vestigial wiring after the pre-merge deploy gate was removed from the main ruleset).

Section 2 of the pipeline-improvements audit: added dependency-review PR job (actions/dependency-review-action@v4, fail-on-severity high, wired into ci-pass needs) for pre-merge blocking of vulnerable deps; added release.yml workflow on push:tags:v* that extracts CHANGELOG section via new scripts/extract-changelog-section.sh, generates a CycloneDX SBOM with anchore/sbom-action, and publishes the GitHub Release with SBOM attached via softprops/action-gh-release; wrapped the weekly Lighthouse CI step with the bundle-size/license-scan tracking-issue pattern so regressions file a durable issue instead of just a red cron run; documented signed-commits requirement in CONTRIBUTING.md and updated docs/RELEASE.md ruleset table (signed-commits ruleset toggle itself is a manual UI action on develop+main).

Sections 3 and 4 (ex-4.2) of the pipeline-improvements audit: shallowed attribution-guard fetch-depth to 50 with deepening loop; flipped ci-scheduled concurrency to cancel-in-progress: true so back-to-back dispatches don't race on tracking-issue updates; added Playwright+mysql-client+lsof GHCR image (new .github/docker/playwright-e2e.Dockerfile + playwright-image publish job in ci.yml) and switched e2e to consume it via needs+outputs, removing the per-run apt-get install; prepended a selectable-templates hint to the default pull_request_template.md; added non-blocking pr-size.yml workflow that labels PRs by additions+deletions and posts a sticky advisory comment on xl/xxl; added renovate-config job to ci.yml (gated on renovate.json changes via a new paths-filter output on detect) running renovate-config-validator --strict; removed the now-dead customManager for the Playwright image tag in ci.yml (replaced by Renovate's built-in Docker manager on the Dockerfile FROM line).
